message:
fix(trust-card): verify card signature on every read path and harden evidence validation

Introduce latest_verified_card() helper that calls verify_card_signature
before returning any card. Thread it through create, update, read, list,
search, read_version, and sync_cache so every code path that returns a
card verifies its hash. Cache entries failing verification are evicted
and rebuilt from the authoritative source.

Change list, search, and list_by_publisher from Vec<TrustCard> to
Result<Vec<TrustCard>, TrustCardError>. Add ensure_evidence_refs_present
guard rejecting empty evidence_refs on update. Make paged_response
hard-reject page=0 or per_page=0 instead of silently clamping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
